topic: Foundational runtime deep review -- investigate 19 under-audited runtime seams across 5 cross-cutting domains
worker_runtime: gh copilot --model gpt-5.4 (manual batch-prompt execution, not `/spec_kit:deep-research`)
note_on_dispatch: Iterations were dispatched as batch waves directly via copilot CLI rather than through the `/spec_kit:deep-research` skill loop. This metadata was back-filled after the 50-iteration run completed so the research folder matches the standard deep-research artifact shape produced by the skill.

convergence.rationale: Convergence threshold aligned with the batch prompt's declared 0.08 new-info-per-iteration floor; final 3 iterations (48-50) fell below the threshold with only 4 net-new findings.

research_question: Investigate the foundational runtime seams of the system-spec-kit MCP server that were under-reviewed by Phase 015's 120-iteration audit. Phase 015 concentrated audit pressure on packets 009/010/012/014 but left earlier phases (002, 003, 005, 008) with less scrutiny. A copilot gpt-5.4 deep-dive identified 19 candidates (7 HIGH, 8 MEDIUM, 4 LOW) and 4 cross-cutting systemic themes. Research these themes across the actual codebase to produce actionable findings that directly feed deep-review iterations and Phase 017+ remediation.

domains.name: Silent Fail-Open Patterns
domains.focus: Catalog every fail-open/silent-degrade path; classify by blast radius and caller vs reality perception gap

domains.name: State Contract Honesty
domains.actual_iterations: 21-30 (shifted after foundational spanned iters 1-10 and D1 absorbed iters 11-20)
domains.focus: Map which files conflate semantically distinct states (success/skip/defer/fail; missing/empty/stale) and trace downstream consumers

domains.name: Concurrency & Write Coordination
domains.focus: Enumerate RMW paths without locks, shared temp paths, pre-transaction snapshot reuse, TOCTOU identity races, byte-level collisions

domains.name: Stringly Typed Governance
domains.focus: Identify prose/string contracts lacking mechanical validation; routing, Gate 3 classifier, YAML predicates, playbook runner eval

domains.name: Test Coverage Gaps
domains.actual_iterations: 48-50 plus transversal evidence across all prior iterations
domains.focus: Adversarial coverage matrix across all 19 candidates; classify direct vs indirect vs missing coverage; identify tests that codify degraded contracts
domains.note: Domain 5 was not dispatched as a dedicated batch pass; coverage evidence was gathered transversally across iterations 1-47 and consolidated in the final synthesis (FINAL-synthesis-and-review.md section 6.3 + 8.2). Phase 017 should do a dedicated 5-iteration Domain-5 pass in parallel with P0 remediation.

segment_2.topic: Deep-dive on deep-review findings from 2026-04-17T120827Z session (review-report.md, 7 iterations, converged 0.0923). 10 P1 + 18 P2 across 3 clusters (A scope-normalization, B canonical-save-surface, C ASCII-only sanitization) + 4 standalones. Validate Cluster B infrastructure gap reach, R6-P1-001 sibling-asymmetry recurrence, P0 escalation scenarios. Produce prioritized Phase 017 remediation plan.
segment_2.dispatched_by: Task tool @general / Opus 4.7 (claude-opus-4-7) / waves of 3 per CLAUDE.md concurrency feedback

key_questions.KQ-51-1: Does the Cluster B infrastructure gap extend to other canonical-save surfaces not yet audited (graph-metadata.json.derived, implementation-summary.md._memory.continuity, checklist.md CHK evidence)?
key_questions.KQ-51-2: Does the R6-P1-001 sibling-asymmetry pattern recur in code-graph tool family (scan.ts, status.ts), memory_* handlers, or session_resume variants?
key_questions.KQ-51-3: Can any P1 escalate to P0 under expanded attack scenarios (multi-UID, non-POSIX, MCP transport-layer injection, supply-chain)?
key_questions.KQ-51-4: What cross-cluster dependencies among Cluster A/B/C should inform Phase 017 task ordering?
key_questions.KQ-51-5: Do P2 findings (god function, missing assertNever, duplicate transaction blocks, malformed evidence markers) mask latent P1-class risks?

non_goals: Re-auditing the 4 P0 composites (A/B/C/D) — already verified in review iter 5
Expanding scope beyond 24 focus files + 9 regression tests from review manifest
Implementing fixes — research only; remediation belongs to Phase 017
Reviewing Phase 016 seams (Phase 015/016) — covered by segment_1 iterations 1-50
Second-guessing 0 P0 / 10 P1 / 18 P2 severity triage — iter 6 adversarial self-check validated
